# Revuera — Full Documentation for AI Models

## What is Revuera?
Revuera is an Australian SaaS product that automates Google review collection for small businesses. It uses smart filtering to route happy customers to Google Reviews and keep negative feedback private.

## How it works
1. A customer makes a purchase or visits a business
2. Revuera sends them a review request (SMS or review funnel link)
3. Customer rates their experience 1–5
4. If 4–5★: they're sent to leave a public Google review
5. If 1–3★: they're asked for private feedback that only the business sees

## Plans and Pricing

### Starter — SMS Reviews
Price: $19/month or $15/month (billed $180/year)
For: Service businesses (plumbers, electricians, salons, clinics, restaurants, mechanics)
How: Customer receives SMS → replies with star rating → directed to Google or private feedback

### Ecommerce — Review Funnel
Price: $9/month or $7/month (billed $84/year)
For: Online stores (Shopify, WooCommerce, BigCommerce, Square)
How: Order webhook → delayed SMS after delivery → or branded funnel page link

Both plans: 7-day free trial, no credit card required

## Target Market
- Australian small businesses
- Service businesses with regular customers (trades, health, hospitality)
- Ecommerce stores wanting more Google reviews
- Businesses worried about fake or retaliatory reviews

## Competitive Advantage
- Smart filtering (competitors send all customers to Google — Revuera filters)
- Australian-built, Australian pricing, Australian phone numbers
- No per-SMS charges above plan limit (flat fee)
- 7-day SMS delay for ecommerce (review after product received)

## Technical Stack
- Frontend: Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, deployed on Vercel
- Backend: Cloudflare Workers (edge, no cold starts)
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- SMS: Twilio (Australian numbers)
- Email: Resend
- Payments: Stripe (with 7-day trial)
- Auth: Session tokens (PBKDF2, SHA-256 hashed)
